## Why It Works

It calls people to the carpet with the opener and people know they're right. Then the point is driven home with a number (95%) and gives people a few simple steps they can take to do better.

## Template

You're underestimating how many [THING PEOPLE AREN'T RECOGNIZING] there are.
95% of [THAT THING] need [THING RELATED TO ABOVE].
[STEP 1], [STEP 2], and you'll [REACH DESIRED OUTCOME].
